Sequence UI: Svelte 5 runes + Tailwind v4 CSS-first + TypeScript design system for dense, flat, sharp, light/dark instrument-panel interfaces extracted from Sequence Toy.

North star: high-density professional desktop software (DAWs, node editors, pro color tools) — NOT a terminal or hacker aesthetic. Compact but easy to use. Sans is the voice of the UI; mono is an instrumentation accent for values/code/tags only. The canonical settings/inspector page is the RAIL: one continuous bordered surface of CollapsibleSection header rows (0 gap, shared hairlines; see src/routes/examples/settings). Nested CollapsibleSections auto-render as twirl-downs. h2-led sections + 16px stack-section are for specimen/doc pages only.

Key paths:
- README.md: human-facing overview, install, usage, commands, component catalog.
- AGENTS.md: prescriptive coding-agent visual spec and anti-patterns.
- docs/design-spec.md: fonts, OKLCH tokens, type roles, spacing, dark-mode wiring.
- src/app.css: authoritative tokens, @theme inline mappings, @custom-variant dark, 10 type-role utilities, stack utilities, base resets.
- src/lib/index.ts: authoritative export list.
- registry.json: registry source file expected by scripts/build-registry.mjs.
- static/r/: generated shadcn-svelte registry item output directory.

Install pattern:
npx shadcn-svelte@latest add <url>/r/<name>.json

Dev commands:
- pnpm dev --port 5199
- pnpm check
- pnpm build
- pnpm registry:build

Design constants:
- Base type: 12.5px.
- Tailwind spacing: --spacing: 0.25rem.
- Radius: --radius: 0rem.
- Corners: sharp.
- Surfaces: flat, no shadows.
- Surface tiers: containers (Panel/Pane/CollapsibleSection bodies) are flat on bg-background, read by their border; only fields/controls/chrome ride the raised tier (bg-card / bg-panel); bg-muted is hover/emphasis only, never a resting surface (except bar tracks). A resting bg-muted block glows on a flat panel.
- Motion: no state-transition animations — state changes are instant (professional-software feel); only continuous feedback (spinners, indeterminate bars) animates via @keyframes.
- Control height: every single-line boxed control is exactly h-control (22px) or h-control-sm (18px); never py-* sized. Composites put h-control on the bordered wrapper.
- Cursor: desktop convention — arrow on all controls (never cursor-pointer on buttons/tabs/checkboxes); pointer is for links only; mechanic cursors (ew-resize, grab) where drag exists; no cursor-not-allowed.
- Selected state: primary tint (bg-primary/12 rows, bg-primary-accent/15 controls) or inversion — never surface-pair contrast (panel vs card coincide in dark).
- Feedback: press > hover — every control has an instant active: pressed state one step deeper than its subtle hover; never hover-without-press; list rows hover-highlight only.
- Tinted feedback via theme-scoped tokens: hover:bg-<accent>/(--tint-hover), active:bg-<accent>/(--tint-active) (solids: --tint-solid-*; gradients: hover:brightness-(--lift-hover)) — tokens run larger in dark for perceptual parity; never hand-pick hover alphas.
- Icons: fixed-px glyphs (10/11/13), decoupled from --spacing so they don't scale with density.
- Borders: thin border-border hairlines.
- Fonts: Berkeley Mono Variable (mono, bundled woff2 + @font-face, licensed — consumers bring their own); Inter (sans, self-hosted v4.1 variable woff2, SIL OFL — ships with the system).
- Dark mode: .dark class on html, localStorage key sequence-ui-theme, modes light/dark/system.

Type roles:
- type-display
- type-heading
- type-title
- type-body
- type-fine
- type-label
- type-tag
- type-button
- type-value
- type-code

Stack utilities:
- stack-tight (4px): label/field and parts of one control.
- stack-field (6px): sibling controls in a panel body. Proximity invariant: tight < field — inner binding strictly tighter than sibling separation; bordered siblings (panels, rail rows) need no whitespace signal, so group stays 4px.
- stack-group (4px): related groups or bordered panels.
- stack-section (16px): h2-led page sections only.
- pad-box: the one content-box inset (padding: var(--pad-box)).
- prose: running-text blocks (panel/section descriptions). @apply's type-body + owns its rhythm (1U margin-block, zeroed at stack edges) so prose sits 8px off adjacent controls. The one sanctioned child margin; explicit marker so control text on type-body is unaffected.

Component exports:
- Buttons: ActionButton, Button, IconButton, SegmentedControl.
- Primitives: AppBar, Panel, BorderedGroup, CollapsibleSection, Pane.
- Controls: Slider, NumberInput, ScrubInput, AngleField, ThresholdMarker, TextInput, TimecodeField, BitField, BaseField, ToleranceField, SelectInput, ToggleGroup, CheckboxInput, RadioGroupInput, RadioInput, FormLabel, ResetValueButton.
- Feedback: Statistic, ControlsStatistic, Note, ControlsNote, Citations, Tooltip, UserGuideTooltip.
- Navigation: Menu, Breadcrumb, Pagination, Tree.
- Data: CapacityBar, ProgressBar, TimeBrush.
- Icons: ChevronIcon, CheckboxIcon, RadioIcon.
- Theme: ThemeProvider, ThemeToggle.
- Optional: KatexBlock, Footnote, FootnotesProvider, Portal.

Non-component exports:
- getThemeContext
- PaneTab
- SelectOption
- CitationEntries
- MenuItem
- TreeNode
- CapacitySegment
- ThemeMode
- ThemeContext

Agent warnings:
- Use type roles, never raw text-* sizes for UI typography.
- Spacing belongs to containers; components are margin-free.
- Mono is reserved for buttons, numeric values/readouts, code, and small instrument tags — never branding (the AppBar title is sans semibold).
- Never use uppercase mono eyebrow over a big title.
- Never use left-border active selection cues; use background fill or text color.
- Never add rounded corners, shadows, glass, skeuomorphism, or loose dashboard spacing.
- Segmented controls use one outer border, borderless inner segments, and 1px dividers.
